title: Express Middleware, Promise Errors, Dependencies, and Response Ownership · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs express middleware, promise errors, dependencies, and response ownership from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the composed middleware, dependency, and error boundary. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for composed middleware, dependency, and error boundary after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defen…
objectives: Compose request identity, trust, limits, parsing, authentication, authorization, application, error, and observation middleware in a defended order.
Use Express 5 automatic Promise rejection forwarding while preserving causal error identity and avoiding duplicate next calls.
Implement four-argument error middleware, normalized failure taxonomy, disclosure policy, and headersSent delegation without double writes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Transport Domain Response Owner
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 6443 in a administrative API crossing two identity and network trust zones. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to trace defended middleware order while keeping error and response ownership explicit; record only bounded redacted diagnostic fields; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate transport parsing, domain decisions, persistence, external effects, and serialization while assigning exactly one response owner.

Inspect the Transport Domain Response Owner trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Transport Domain Response Owner.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for separate transport parsing, domain decisions, persistence, external effects, and serialization while assigning exactly one response owner. For Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Transport Domain Response Owner, keep Transport Domain Response Owner connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
